findings.description: The security step imports `backend` from `../../lib/backend` (the legacy compatibility surface) instead of `../../lib/backend-client` (the canonical backend client). AGENTS.md explicitly states: 'src/lib/backend.ts is legacy / browser-preview fixture surface, not to be used for new shell contract.' Every other file in the import and onboarding scope uses `../../lib/backend-client`. While both modules expose a `keyringStatus()` method, the legacy module is documented as a deprecated surface and the two implementations may diverge in behavior or typing over time.
findings.suggestedFix: Change the import to `import { backend } from '../../lib/backend-client'` in both security-step.tsx and security-step.test.tsx.
